message:
feat(stream): add XADD MAXLEN/MINID/NOMKSTREAM and XTRIM MINID support

XADD now supports inline trimming options:
- MAXLEN [=|~] count: cap stream size after adding
- MINID [=|~] id: remove entries below threshold after adding
- NOMKSTREAM: don't create stream if key doesn't exist

XTRIM now supports MINID in addition to MAXLEN, and both accept
the ~ (approximate) modifier.

Adds xtrim_minid() to Store, 29 conformance tests covering all
new XADD/XTRIM options, and updates existing tests.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
